commands.review_summary:
The PR normalizes raw Codex dynamic-tool plugin payloads into `AgentToolResult` envelopes before middleware/extensions and Codex content conversion, and adds a regression test for a plain object payload.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +33. Total +69 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows a raw dynamic-tool result can reach `convertToolContents(result.content)`, whose first operation is `content.reduce`, matching the reported failure when `content` is undefined.

target.title: Fix Codex dynamic tools returning raw payloads
target.body:
Fixes #97913.

## What Problem This Solves

EVAOS Workbench Mac-control visible-agent proof exposed Codex dynamic tool calls failing with `Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'reduce')` even though direct gateway `tools.invoke` for the same bridge tool succeeded. The failing path let a raw plugin payload reach `convertToolContents(result.content)` without normalizing it into an `AgentToolResult` envelope first.

This PR normalizes raw plugin payloads before Codex dynamic-tool middleware/extensions and content conversion, while leaving already-structured `AgentToolResult` responses unchanged.

## Summary

- Normalize raw plugin payloads into an `AgentToolResult` before Codex dynamic-tool middleware/extensions and content conversion.
- Keep existing structured `AgentToolResult` responses unchanged.
- Add a regression for a plugin tool whose `execute` returns a plain payload object.

## Evidence

- `git diff --check`
- Direct patched-runtime proof against the installed bundled dynamic-tool bridge: raw payload response normalized to `success: true` and `inputText` JSON.
- Evidence artifact: `/Volumes/LEXAR/Codex/evidence/mac-control-contract-unification/openclaw-tool-repro/after-runtime-normalizer/direct-bridge-raw-payload-proof.json`

## Not Run Locally

- Vitest: this Lexar source worktree has no `node_modules`; `scripts/run-vitest.mjs` reports dependencies missing. GitHub CI owns the full repo test gate.

## Release Boundary

This is runtime/tool-result envelope hardening only. It does not claim EVAOS Workbench release readiness; signed installed-app proof remains tracked in 100yenadmin/evaOS-GUI#480.
target.author: 100yenadmin
